character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group planning the voyage, addressed by the squire as ship's doctor.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Plans to acquire a ship and crew, addresses Dr. Livesey as ship's doctor.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Under the care of Redruth, spends time imagining adventures on the map.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Designated as cabin-boy by the squire, part of the group planning the voyage.

character_dossiers.name: Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Cares for Jim at the hall, involved in the group's preparations.

character_dossiers.name: Joyce
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group traveling to Bristol with the squire.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group traveling to Bristol with the squire.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Addresses Trelawney, part of the group planning the voyage.
